description_long: This is a modern detached house set within a fenced rectangular plot, featuring a main two-story residence and a separate single-story garage. The main house has a dark gray hipped roof, white and wood-accented exterior walls, and large windows that provide ample natural light. The property is surrounded by a metal fence and includes a paved driveway and walkways leading to both the main entrance and the garage. The front entryway is sheltered by an overhang and flanked by a small porch area. The landscaping consists of a well-maintained green lawn with minimal ornamental features. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a blend of contemporary and natural materials.
description: A modern two-story house with a detached garage, dark hipped roof, wood and white exterior, and a fenced green yard with paved walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and the detached garage to the right, all within a fenced yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the main house, the garage's proximity, and the paved paths connecting both structures.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade of the house, large window panels, and the garage's rear wall, with the yard and fence enclosing the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side entrance, garage, and the continuity of the paved walkways and green lawn.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, small porch, and a modern door, accessed by a paved path and steps.
